channel.title: Industrial Robots on Arjun Gandhi
channel.description: Recent content in Industrial Robots on Arjun Gandhi

item.title: Ofs
item.description:
The Blurb

OFS (Optical Fiber Solutions) is a fiber manufacturing company. I’ve held two internships here (one in high school, and one the summer that I wrote this. My biggest project there was suggesting solutions and improvements to a fiber storage robot known as the ASRS.

item.title: Symbotic Robotics Challenge
item.description:
The Blurb

Symbotic builds and automates warehouses. While moving big boxes sometimes their robots sometimes spill a variety of foods on the track and they needed away to clean it up. So they a cash prize and held a competition. WPI decided to put 5 freshman and one somophore on the project. My team and I won 2nd place and 25,000 dollars.
